findings.message: wheel includes louke/.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/{bug,feature}.yml (2 files). This is pre-existing (the old explicit [tool.setuptools] packages = ["louke", ...] also included them) and not introduced by Batch 1. The include = ["louke*"] pattern is correct per gap-analysis recommendation. These are small YAML files with no runtime impact, but future filter refinement could exclude non-code data directories.

louke/web/pages/projects.py:457 has placeholder="v0.12.0" in an HTML input field. This is a UI form hint, not a package version, so it was correctly NOT changed. However, after the 0.12.1 release, users typing into this form will see a placeholder suggesting v0.12.0. Consider updating it to v0.12.1 for consistency in a future batch.

Test docstrings reference S1 (#174) and S2 (#175) at the class level, and gap-analysis §3 P0-1 in test_clean_venv_can_import_v012_subpackages. AC markers are adequate but could be more granular (per-test-function). Not a blocker.

summary: All 6 tests are real, hermetic, and test the actual AC. No anti-patterns, no security issues, version literal audit is complete and accurate. PASS with 3 low-severity observations.
